summary: All planned Bun tests, runner, build, bead lint, graph hygiene, and no-close invariant checks passed after addressing 3 review findings. Test count increased from 44 to 48 with behavioral coverage of retry branch, hasPendingMessages guard, and scheduler fallback.

passedChecks.command: bv --robot-triage --format json && bv --robot-alerts --format json && br show "ultramode-air" --json
passedChecks.expected: Bead remains relevant, has no alerts, and is in_progress for verification.
passedChecks.result: Exit 0. Triage reported ultramode-air in_progress, alerts summary total 0, and br show returned status in_progress with assignee assistant.

passedChecks.expected: Changed files include the 4 files touched by the review-fix commit: index.ts (new exports), test/mocks.ts (onHandlers), test/retry-logic.test.ts (behavioral tests), test/error-paths.test.ts (guard + fallback tests).
passedChecks.result: Exit 0. Output listed exactly: index.ts, test/error-paths.test.ts, test/mocks.ts, test/retry-logic.test.ts.

passedChecks.expected: Retry logic tests exit 0, including behavioral tests that exercise the actual retry branch in handleTurnEnd.
passedChecks.result: Exit 0. 9 pass, 0 fail, 30 expect() calls. Tests now invoke handleTurnEnd with mocked decide() returning {action:'retry'} and assert sendUserMessage receives COMMAND_FROM_PHASE (not PHASE_WHITELIST), retries increment, cap triggers markBlocked, and no-command case resets to selection.

passedChecks.expected: Error path tests exit 0, including hasPendingMessages guard tests and scheduler fallback tests.
passedChecks.result: Exit 0. 13 pass, 0 fail, 36 expect() calls. Tests now register the ultramode() factory, capture the turn_end handler, and verify the guard skips handleTurnEnd when pending=true and proceeds when false. Scheduler fallback tests verify runSelection calls br list when scheduler returns empty recommendations.

passedChecks.expected: Runner executes bun test test/ and exits 0.
passedChecks.result: Exit 0. 48 pass, 0 fail, 153 expect() calls across 5 files.
Exit 0. 48 pass, 0 fail, 153 expect() calls across 5 files.

passedChecks.expected: Named exports and default extension entry point build successfully.
passedChecks.result: Exit 0. Bun emitted non-bundled JavaScript for index.ts with exported constants/functions (including new exports: getState, runSelection, handleTurnEnd) and default ultramode factory.

passedChecks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
print(Path('index.ts').read_text().count('/close'))
PY

passedChecks.expected: Graph hygiene suggests no required follow-up before review.

uncheckedRisks: Plan.md did not contain a Risks table. No plan-listed risks were left unchecked.
PRD out-of-scope live OMP session behavior was not checked because this bead is explicitly unit-test-only and avoids live model/session dependencies.
PRD out-of-scope worktree enforcement was not checked because state.worktreePath behavior belongs to a separate bead.

artifacts.purpose: Provides named exports for testable internals including getState, runSelection, handleTurnEnd (added to address review findings). Preserves default OMP extension factory.
Provides reusable mock infrastructure including MockExtensionAPI with onHandlers map for capturing registered event handlers.
Proves parseDecision handles brace-in-prose, multiple objects, nested JSON, invalid actions, missing JSON, empty input, and selection decisions.
Proves reconstructState validates persisted mode/phase data, applies defaults, skips corrupt entries, and uses the last valid control entry.
Proves phase map consistency, pr terminal behavior, command reverse mapping, valid phases, retry cap, and absence of merge-phase commands.
Proves retry command direction uses current-phase commands and retry cap/no-command invariants remain guarded. Now exercises the actual retry branch via handleTurnEnd with mocked decide().
Proves decide no-model/no-key failures, completeSimple fallback, hasPendingMessages guard behavior via turn_end handler, and scheduler fallback to br list. extractText and truncate helpers.
Provides the planned shell runner for bun test test/.
